01-nyc-item.title: Inspect an NYPL item
01-nyc-item.body: The named NYPL catalog fixture renders an item with its authors, editions, copies, and holds from the same pulled YAML tree used by the git-backed walkthroughs.

02-nyc-collection.title: Inspect an NYPL collection
02-nyc-collection.body: The Staff Picks collection ties items and shelves together by id reference, proving the fixture is rich enough for validation and diffs.
